name: pmUSD
collateral: TokenBlender (TB) base token held on-chain in RAAC's RWf(x) Treasury; TB is minted against I-ON Digital's ION.au token held in the TokenBlender contract, and ION.au represents a gold-backed digital security and in-situ gold claim
pegMechanism: RWf(x), an f(x) protocol fork, mints pmUSD as the fToken against TB / ION.au-linked collateral; xPM absorbs collateral-price volatility while pmUSD is configured for stable fNAV; minting and system operations are manager-only through authorized silo multisigs

reserves.name: On-chain TokenBlender (TB) backed by ION.au / in-situ gold claims
